qtype: Operations with positive and negative integers (temperature)
tex:
The temperature at midnight is $-2\,^\circ\text{C}$.
\newline

The temperature at noon is $5\,^\circ\text{C}$.
\newline

(a) Find the difference between these temperatures.
\newline

(b) The temperature at $9\,\text{am}$ is $8\,^\circ\text{C}$ higher than the temperature at midnight.
\newline

Work out the temperature at $9\,\text{am}$.
\newline

content.content:
Find the difference between these temperatures.
\newline

The temperature at $9\,\text{am}$ is $8\,^\circ\text{C}$ higher than the temperature at midnight.
\newline

Work out the temperature at $9\,\text{am}$.
\newline

stem.content:
The temperature at midnight is $-2\,^\circ\text{C}$.
\newline

The temperature at noon is $5\,^\circ\text{C}$.
\newline

_rawBody:
The temperature at midnight is $-2\,^\circ\text{C}$.

The temperature at noon is $5\,^\circ\text{C}$.

\begin{parts}
\item Find the difference between these temperatures.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[][$^\circ\text{C}$]
\Marks{1}

\item The temperature at 9\,am is $8\,^\circ\text{C}$ higher than the temperature at midnight.

\vgap

Work out the temperature at 9\,am.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[][$^\circ\text{C}$]
\Marks{1}
\end{parts}

qtype: Venn diagrams, set notation, probability from sets
tex:

\newline

\newline

(a) Complete the Venn diagram.
\newline

(b) Find $\mathrm{n}(G)$.
\newline

(c) A student is chosen at random.
\newline

Work out the probability that the student does not study History and does not study Geography.
\newline

qtype: forming and solving simultaneous linear equations from word problem
tex:

\newline

\newline

Write down a pair of simultaneous equations and solve them to find the cost of one apple and the cost of one pear.
\newline

\newline

Li buys 4 apples and 5 pears for \$16.

\vgap
